title: Venugopala Swamy Temple
tagline: Venugopala Swamy Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Venugopala Swamy Temple located at Hosa Kannambadi, near Krishna Raja Sagara, is an example of Hoysala architecture in Karnataka, India.
overview.description: The Venugopala Swamy Temple located at Hosa Kannambadi, near Krishna Raja Sagara, is an example of Hoysala architecture in Karnataka, India. This temple was built in the 12th century AD around the same time as the Chennakesava Temple at Somanathapura, Mysore district.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Brindavan Gardens
topPlaces.description: The Brindavan Gardens is a garden located 12 k.ms from the city of Mysore in the Mandya District of the Indian State of Karnataka. It lies adjoining the Krishnarajasagara Dam which is built across the river Kaveri.

topPlaces.name: Krishna Raja Sagara
topPlaces.description: Krishna Raja Sagara, also popularly known as KRS, is a lake and the dam that creates it. They are close to the settlement of Krishna Raja Sagara in the Indian State of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Hongahalli, Mandya
topPlaces.description: Hongahalli is a census town (as per Census 2011, its location code number is 614310) located at the southwestern border of Mandya district towards Mysuru district. It is famously known as Krishnaraja Sagara, due to KRS dam located here in this village.

topPlaces.name: Anandur, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Anandur is a panchayat village in Mysore Taluka, Mysore District, Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Belagola
topPlaces.description: Belagola , sometimes referred to as Mandya Belagola to distinguish it from Shravana Belagola, is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located about 15 kilometers north-northwest of Mysuru city in the Shrirangapattana taluk of Mandya district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Yelwal
topPlaces.description: Yelwala or Ilvaala is a Census town in the city of Mysore in Karnataka, India. This place is located between Mysore and Hunsur.

topPlaces.name: Palahalli
topPlaces.description: Palahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Shrirangapattana taluk of Mandya district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Venugopala Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Venugopala Swamy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Venugopala Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (26 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (17 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Venugopala Swamy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Venugopala Swamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Venugopala Swamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Venugopala Swamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Venugopala Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Brindavan Gardens, Krishna Raja Sagara, Hongahalli, Mandya, Anandur, Karnataka, Belagola.
